title: calea triantha
intro: Calea triantha, also known as the Three-Flowered Calea, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to relieve pain and muscle cramps. The health benefits of Calea triantha include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as having antimicrobial properties to aid in wound healing. Calea triantha can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves or flowers in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture or capsule supplement to harness its medicinal properties.
